pi_items.source: Web search confirmed books.toscrape.com is a real public website and demo sandbox for web scraping practice
Extracted from target_url and confirmed as real domain

Screaming Frog SEO Spider documentation (https://www.screamingfrog.co.uk/seo-spider/user-guide/tabs/) confirms all three columns are available in the Internal tab export: Response Time (seconds to download), Size (from Content-Length header), Word Count (words in body tag)
Path matches exactly what is used in export_result.sh line 17 ($REPORTS_DIR/performance_report.txt where REPORTS_DIR=/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports)
Path matches exactly what is used in setup_task.sh line 29 and export_result.sh line 14 where EXPORT_DIR is set to this value
Task description states 'The report must be a text file with at least 400 characters of analysis'. Verifier checks report_len >= 400 (verifier.py line 113)

privileged_info_summary: The page_performance_audit task crawls books.toscrape.com, a real public website designed as a sandbox for web scraping practice. The required CSV export columns (Response Time, Size, Word Count) are all standard features of Screaming Frog SEO Spider's Internal tab export. The report output path is /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/performance_report.txt and export directory is /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports. The minimum report length requirement is 400 characters. All metadata claims match the actual implementation in the task scripts and verified against authoritative sources.
